{{CargoRelic
|name=Exquisite Pipa
|class_id=22577
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=08-22
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Aug 22, 734 AD, Emperor Shomu received this Exquisite Pipa as a tribute from Japanese envoys returning from Tang China.<br>This pipa was the imperial property of Emperor Shomu and was greatly loved by him. It is 32 inches long and about nine inches wide at the belly, made entirely of rosewood, with bird, butterfly, flower, and cloud patterns and auspicious seashell patterns. Between the flower and leaf hearts, there are red and blue powder colors, gold-lined edges, and decorated with precious materials such as amber and tortoiseshell. On the front panel, thirteen six-petal small groups of flowers are competing, and the Hu people and camel pipa picture below are amazing. On the back of the pipa, countless luminous shells are inlaid, each with exquisite patterns carved on them, some even painted with a light golden color, and the entire pattern is luxurious and gorgeous, rich and imposing.
|fame=48
|art=42
|fth=50
|civ=72
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +12<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +3<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss2=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +16<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +4<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss3=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +20<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +5<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss4=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +7<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss5=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +9<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50
|ss7=Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +36<br>Per Dung Beetles Calculation LVL, Snail ATK +9<br>Dung Beetles Calculation: 50/50<br>Per 30 T7+ Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +28 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Goldfish skill II.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion HP +4.5%
|skill2=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's CIV +10
}}
